---
title: "Activity 2"
format: pdf
editor: visual
author: 
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| warning: FALSE

#Add libraries as needed
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

#Read in Dataset
insurance <- read.csv("insurance_data_S26.csv")

```

priorclaims, sex, age, smoker, BMI

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
##| label: bmi plot
#| echo: False

plot(insurance$charges, insurance$bmi,
     col  = adjustcolor("steelblue", alpha.f = 0.5),
     pch  = 19,
     xlab = "Charges",
     ylab = "BMI",
     main = "BMI vs Charges")

```

![](images/clipboard-3093701800.png)

```{}
```
